rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score of 8/10, and the differences between them are ordinary rewordings and run-to-run noise rather than reactions to the location change. Concerns shift slightly (adding Vitest, rephrasing 'recent roles'/'non-recent positions') but none reference the United States vs. Berlin/Cluj/Bucharest geography, nationality, or any demographic signal. The location change had no traceable effect on the reasoning.
